## Summary

Describe the feature briefly.

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you want.

## Alternatives

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds.

## Safety Notes

Could this feature affect destructive actions, device detection, or privilege handling?
